summary_text: As of 2026-04-17 08:03 UTC, the recent Canada earthquake dataset contains 545 events from the current rolling window. In the last 24 hours, 10 events were recorded, including 0 in the last hour. The largest event in the last 24 hours was M4.21 at 193 km W of Port Hardy, BC/193 km O de Port Hardy, BC. The deepest event reached 10.00 km at 198 km W of Port Hardy, BC/198 km O de Port Hardy, BC. The most recent listed event was M2.73 at Suspected industry-related event, 11 km WNW of Sturgeon County, AB/Événement lié à l'industrie soupconné, 11 km ONO de Sturgeon County, AB at 2026-04-16T16:03:39.000Z. There were 3 events of magnitude 3 or greater and 1 of magnitude 4 or greater in the last 24 hours. The most active regions were BC (4) and YT (4).
